kw.name: New Browser

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "defaultBrowserType": "chromium", "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "tracing": true, "viewport": { "height": 720, "width": 1280 } }

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Modify Cart Based On Price

kw.name: Handle Cart Items By Price
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.msg: Found locator('.inventory_item button').first(),locator('.inventory_item button').nth(1),locator('.inventory_item button').nth(2),locator('.inventory_item button').nth(3),locator('.inventory_item button').nth(4),locator('.inventory_item button').nth(5) Locators successfully.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Error: locator.click: Unsupported token "@data-test" while parsing css selector ".//button[starts-with(@data-test, "remove-")]". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for .//button[starts-with(@data-test, "remove-")]
